title: Rurouni Kenshin
titleNative: るろうに剣心 -明治剣客浪漫譚-
synonyms: Rurouni Kenshin: Meiji Swordsman Romantic Story
ซามูไรพเนจร
synopsis: Himura Kenshin is a vagabond with a dark past and sunny disposition. Not a ronin but a rurouni, he was never a samurai, but an assassin of utmost skill in the Meiji restoration, who in the turning point of the war simply walked away. His travels lead him to Tokyo in the 11th year of the Meiji era, where he befriends a female Kendo master, a former thief, a brawler and a doctor all with their own secrets. Together they fight off the enemies surfacing from the dark past that Kenshin cannot escape. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Bobo-kun
titleNative: ぼうぼう君
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . A short film of a fire demon called "Bobo-kun," eating one piece of coal after another. This character would later be re-used as Calcifer, who appears in Howl's Moving Castle.

title: Piyopiyo Baba
titleNative: ぴよぴよバーバ
synopsis: Part of a series of animated short films shown at the Ghibli Museum in Mitaka called "Film Guru Guru" . Yubaba, a character from Spirited Away, returns in this short. She turns to the front, opens her mouth and laughs, and when she turns 180 degrees and turns backward, a small bird comes out of her hair and screams. When the little bird retracts into her hair, Yubaba turns 180 degrees again, turns to the front, and laughs once more.

title: Li Xiongmao
titleNative: 李熊猫
synopsis: Adapted from a novel by Wen Zhou, this story follows Li Xiongmao, a human boy raised by demons who is sent by his master to leave Black-White Mountain and kill the three enemies responsible for the demons’ downfall. As he searches for the truth, he gradually unravels the mysteries behind the conflict between humans and demons, the secrets of the dynasty, and his own destiny. (Source: iQIYI, translated)

title: The Fable 2nd Season
titleNative: ザ・ファブル 第2期
synopsis: The second season of The Fable .

title: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44:CLOUDY BEACH
titleRomaji: Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. 44:CLOUDY BEACH
titleNative: 死亡遊戯で飯を食う。44:CLOUDY BEACH
synonyms: SHIBOYUGI: Playing Death Games to Put Food on the Table - 44: CLOUDY BEACH
synopsis: Theatrical follow-up to Shibou Yuugi de Meshi wo Kuu. This is the story of a certain insane world. Player name: Yuuki. Occupation: Professional in deadly games. Overcoming the jinx known as the "Thirty Game Wall," which drastically reduces the survival rate of players, Yuuki continues her journey. A game where death is always close at hand. Next, she takes on a remote island in the middle of the ocean. Eight players have gathered there. Among them are seasoned veterans whom Yuuki knows. The game is "Cloudy Beach." Beyond the wall, only those who have crossed the wall remain. Today, once again, she makes a living playing deadly games. (Source: Official Site, translated)

title: Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohantabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan Shimashita
titleRomaji: Suterare Seijo no Isekai Gohantabi: Kakure Skill de Camping Car wo Shoukan Shimashita
titleNative: 捨てられ聖女の異世界ごはん旅 隠れスキルでキャンピングカーを召喚しました
synonyms: The Forsaken Saintess and Her Foodie Roadtrip in Another World
synopsis: Rin Takanashi, a caregiver in her thirties, was unceremoniously discarded as "trash" despite being summoned as a saint. However, as a lover of the great outdoors and all things camping, she was blessed with a special skill, "Survival," as well as another unique skill! Thus, a riveting tale begins: one of sweat, tears, and insatiable hunger as Rin, together with companions she picked up along the way, leisurely explores this parallel world and savours gourmet cuisine to her heart's content... Or so the story should have gone, but it looks like their road is going in an unexpected direction...?

title: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
titleRomaji: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai
titleNative: 塩対応の佐藤さんが俺にだけ甘い
synonyms: The Cold Sato-san is Only Sweet to Me
synopsis: Sato-san is the unattainable flower of the class. She is always cold and curt with classmates, but only I know she's actually very cute when she smiles, even if she's not much of a photographer. Oshio-kun is friendly and lively, but only I know he works at his family's cafe after school. He does a great job with the cafe's SNS account, and his mischievous smile makes my heart skip a beat! Innocent and sweet, but sometimes frustrating, this is a 120%-pure fluffy story about two people falling in love for the first time.

title: Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat Majutsushi Boukenroku
titleRomaji: Rakudai Kenja no Gakuin Musou: Nidome no Tensei, S-Rank Cheat Majutsushi Boukenroku
titleNative: 落第賢者の学院無双～二度目の転生、Sランクチート魔術師冒険録～
synonyms: From Overshadowed to Overpowered: Second Reincarnation of a Talentless Sage
The Unsuccessful Yet Academically Unparalleled Sage: A Cheating S-Rank Sorcerer's Post-Rebirth Adventurer Log
synopsis: Ephtal is reincarnated as a human, coming from modern Earth. In this new world where magic is real, he decides to devote the entirety of his life in the pursuit of magic. Despite his efforts, though, he discovers that he is absolutely talentless in magic, and breathed his last in anguish....But it isn't the end for him just yet! He reincarnates once again bearing the same name, Ephtal, 400 years later. Having retained his knowledge and power, he steals his resolve and once again sets his sights for the peak of magic! (Source: Comikey)

title: To You in the Beyond
titleRomaji: Doko yori mo Tooi Basho ni Iru Kimi e
titleNative: どこよりも遠い場所にいる君へ
synopsis: The story centers on a boy named Kazuki Tsukigase, who transfers to a high school on a remote island to get away from anyone who knows him. Kazuki finds out that there is an inlet on the island where people are rumored to disappear. Exploring the inlet, he encounters an unconscious girl. When she comes to after Kazuki takes her to the clinic, she is unable to give out anything about her identity except that she is named Nao, is 16 years old, and whispers the year "1974." (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

title: Mairimashita! Iruma-kun: If Episode of Mafia
titleRomaji: Mairimashita! Iruma-kun: If Episode of Mafia
titleNative: 魔入りました！入間くん if Episode of 魔フィア
synonyms: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun: IruMafia Edition
synopsis: In this brand-new spinoff of the runaway hit series, Iruma is a dirt-poor but kind young boy who grows up in a ruthless city slum. One day, Iruma gives a severely injured old man his last loaf of bread and nurses the stranger back to health—only to find out that the elder gent is none other than Don Sullivan, leader of the Babel Mafia! Soon after, Don Sullivan comes back, whisks Iruma away, and begs the boy to become his grandson. And just like that, the curtains rise on Iruma’s chaotic new life as the next in line to a gigantic gang of—dare we say demonic mafiosos! (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Yani Neko
titleNative: ヤニねこ
synopsis: Yani is a catgirl with a seriously bad smoking habit. She smokes so much that her apartment smells like ash and is littered with cigarette butts—and plenty of other trash! Every time she tries to quit, she becomes weak to the cravings and gives in almost instantly. Will she ever get her life together, or is she doomed to live as a chainsmoking slob forever? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus
titleNative: ドラゴンボール超 ビルス
synopsis: Dragon Ball Super: Beerus, a project that was started a few years ago, is the newly ENHANCED edition of the anime Dragon Ball Super. ENHANCED by the latest visual expression, every scene, especially the battle scenes, is even more immersive, providing a more faithful and detailed reproduction of the original work by Akira Toriyama, and it will deliver a quality that is sure to fully satisfy audiences. (Source: Dragon Ball Official Site)

title: Wan Xiang Zhi Wang
titleNative: 万相之王
synopsis: Luolan Mansion, one of the five major mansions of Daxia in Shenzhou Continent, has fallen into decline due to the mysterious disappearance of two mansion masters. Although the young mansion master Li Luo is extremely talented and was born with three phase palaces, he has difficulty practicing because of his natural empty phase. Jiang Qinge, with whom he had been engaged since childhood, has a ninth-grade light phase and is extremely talented. Realizing the gap between them, Li Luo wanted to cancel the contract and break off the engagement, but was rejected by Jiang Qinge. On his seventeenth birthday, Li Luo took away the secret treasure left by his parents and obtained the water light phase, but the price was that his hair turned white overnight and his life was overdrawn. If he wanted to extend his life, he had to reach the state of a marquis within five years.

tags.name: Full CGI

title: Hotaru no Yomeiri
titleNative: ホタルの嫁入り
synopsis: On the surface, Satoko has it all—she’s beautiful, the daughter of a nobleman, and at a prime age for marriage. Unfortunately, she is also quite ill and only has a short time left to live. Before she can secure a marriage that will redeem her worth in her family’s eyes, she finds herself the target of the mysterious assassin Shinpei, and her plans are put in jeopardy. In order to save herself, she makes a desperate proposal—of marriage! When it comes to love, however, Shinpei takes “until death do we part” seriously. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Tetsunabe no Jan!
titleNative: 鉄鍋のジャン！
synopsis: Jan Akiyama, a cocky arrogant teenager wants to fulfill his grandfathers wish of defeating his arch nemesis Mutsuju Gobancho. When he arrives at the Gobancho restaurant he meets his granddaughter Kiriko Gobancho. Their rivalry is easily compared to Jan's and Kiriko's grandfathers, for Jan believes cooking is about competition and Kiriko believes cooking is about heart.
